mapper.select: SELECT c.*, co.name as coach_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN coach co ON c.coach_id = co.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT c.*, co.name as coach_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN coach co ON c.coach_id = co.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, co.name as coach_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN coach co ON c.coach_id = co.id WHERE c.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, coach_id, description, price, duration, image, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{coachId}, #{description}, #{price}, #{duration}, #{image}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, co.name as coach_name FROM course c LEFT JOIN coach co ON c.coach_id = co.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
